  "clarification_question": "Are you asking for a review of the writing style and clarity (grammar, flow), or a critique of the technical argument (logic, evidence, claims)?",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The agent must disclose any uncertainty in its assessment of the paragraph's claims or clarity.",
    "RX.2": "The agent's feedback must avoid exaggerating flaws or strengths found in the text.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must adhere to the requested scope, which is currently ambiguous and requires clarification.",
    "RX.4": "The agent's feedback should not introduce or amplify potentially harmful interpretations of the research.",
    "RX.5": "The agent must be able to trace its feedback to specific aspects of the provided text."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Are you asking for a review of the writing style and clarity (grammar, flow), or a critique of the technical argument (logic, evidence, claims)?

rationale.RX.1: The agent must disclose any uncertainty in its assessment of the paragraph's claims or clarity.
rationale.RX.2: The agent's feedback must avoid exaggerating flaws or strengths found in the text.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must adhere to the requested scope, which is currently ambiguous and requires clarification.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's feedback should not introduce or amplify potentially harmful interpretations of the research.
rationale.RX.5: The agent must be able to trace its feedback to specific aspects of the provided text.
